title: Gentle Earthy Korean Oats Kalguksu
description: A comforting and earthy Korean dish featuring rolled oats and deep-fry-tod, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, in the form of kalguksu.
instructions: In a large pot, bring 4 cups of water to a boil.
Add the rolled oats and reduce heat to low, simmering for 10 minutes.
In a pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the deep fry tod to the pan and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and cooked oats to the pan, stirring to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the mixture is heated through.
Stir in the chopped green onions and serve hot.
Garnish with additional green onions and serve immediately.
